Rellor

#0952 Scovillain #0954 Rabsca
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Rellor is a Bug type Pokémon introduced in Generation 9.

Evolves into Rabsca.

Rellor

Pokédex data

National № 0953
Type Bug
Species Rolling Pokémon
Height 0.2 m (0′08″)
Weight 1.0 kg (2.2 lbs)
Abilities 1. Compound Eyes
Shed Skin (hidden ability)
Local № 0254 (Scarlet/Violet)
0030 (The Indigo Disk)

Training

EV yield 1 Defense
Catch rate 190 (24.8% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 54
Growth Rate Fast

Breeding

Egg Groups Bug
Gender 50% male, 50% female
Egg cycles 20 (4,884–5,140 steps)

Base stats

HP 41
192 286
Attack 50
94 218
Defense 60
112 240
Sp. Atk 31
60 177
Sp. Def 58
108 236
Speed 30
58 174
Total 270 Min Max

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

Type defenses

The effectiveness of each type on Rellor.

NorFirWatEleGraIceFigPoiGro
2½½½
FlyPsyBugRocGhoDraDarSteFai
22

Evolution chart

#0953
Rellor
Bug
(walk 1,000 steps in Let's Go mode)
#0954
Rabsca
Bug · Psychic

Pokédex entries

Scarlet This Pokémon creates a mud ball by mixing sand and dirt with psychic energy. It treasures its mud ball more than its own life.
Violet It rolls its mud ball around while the energy it needs for evolution matures. Eventually the time comes for it to evolve.

Moves learned by Rellor

Legends: Z-A Scarlet/Violet

Moves learnt by level up

Rellor does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Rellor cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Japanese シガロコ
German Relluk
French Léboulérou

Chinese (Traditional) 蟲滾泥

Japanese ころがしポケモン
German Wälz-Pokémon

Italian Pokémon Rotolatore
Spanish Pokémon Pelotero
Korean 굴리기포켓몬
Chinese (Simplified) 滚动宝可梦
Chinese (Traditional) 滾動寶可夢

Name origin

roller
move by turning on an axis; ‘rellor’ spelled backwards is ’roller’
#0952 Scovillain #0954 Rabsca
